summary: Adding fallback_searchpath parameter to FileSystemLoader for template fallback resolution

type: CLAIM
files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
summary: Adding optional path_transform parameter to all loader classes in loaders.py

type: INTENT
files: src/jinja2/loaders.py (all loader classes: FileSystemLoader, PackageLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader)
summary: Adding optional path_transform callable param to __init__ and applying it in get_source/get_loader before resolution across all loaders; will add path_transform as an additive param after your fallback_searchpath in FileSystemLoader.__init__ signature to avoid clobbering, and apply transform first thing inside get_source before any fallback logic

type: STATUS
files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
summary: fallback_searchpath implementation complete in FileSystemLoader.__init__/get_source/list_templates; signature is (self, searchpath, encoding='utf-8', followlinks=False, fallback_searchpath=None) - please add path_transform as a new keyword param after fallback_searchpath, and apply it before the fallback loop in get_source (self.searchpath + self.fallback_searchpath) so both orderings compose cleanly

type: STATUS
files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
summary: My checkout doesn't show fallback_searchpath (likely isolated sandboxes per agent) so I can't literally add path_transform after it; my path_transform implementation is done for all 6 loaders and applies the transform as the very first step in get_source/get_loader/load (before any other resolution logic), so it composes fine ahead of a fallback_searchpath loop whenever the two patches are merged
